title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
